creator: sfisher@sdf.org
text:
In the second paragraph of section 29.10 of the handbook, it recommends using net/samba-libsmbclient when I believe it should be recommending net/samba-smbclient because the second sentence says "The client provides the ability for a FreeBSD system to access SMB/CIFS shares in a Microsoft® Windows® network."

I just followed the handbook and installed samba-libsmbclient, but now only have some libraries and basic SMB tools, not the client I was looking for.
